message:
feat(rpc): dispatch session_before_switch/session_switch extension hooks on new/resume (bd-1a2o1)

RPC new_session and switch_session handlers now dispatch
session_before_switch (cancellable) and session_switch extension
lifecycle events, bringing them in parity with interactive mode.

- Add rpc_dispatch_session_before_switch helper that calls
  dispatch_cancellable_event(SessionBeforeSwitch) and returns
  whether the switch was cancelled
- Add rpc_dispatch_session_switch_event helper that fires SessionSwitch
  with reason, previousSessionFile, targetSessionFile, sessionId
- new_session handler checks session_before_switch first, returns
  { cancelled: true } if blocked; fires session_switch after success
- switch_session handler uses the same cancellation + event pattern
- Tests: build_agent_session_with_js_extension helper, cancel and
  record extension scripts, 3 new integration tests covering
  cancellation and event emission for both new and resumed sessions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
